Title: Extends the effectiveness of certain provisions relating to the special powers of the New York state environmental facilities corporation
Summary: Extends the effectiveness of certain provisions relating to the special powers of the New York state environmental facilities corporation to 2029.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 307 of the laws of 2005, amending the public authorities law relating to the special powers of the New York state environmental facilities corporation, in relation to extending the effectiveness thereof
